name: visual-design
description: Visual design system toolkit with UX/usability expert review. Consultant skill for establishing design systems via interview or site extraction with page discovery, parallel fingerprinting, fluid responsive detection, and custom component motion discovery; codebase reverse-engineering mode derives tokens and component specs from the repo with chrome-devtools-mcp route inspection (spec at docs/design-system/codebase-reverse-spec-*.md, section-by-section approval, per-file delete confirmation). Component-context skill plus opus component-context agent: minimal return (one full spec + motion) for exact or high-confidence fuzzy; auto top-3 full specs + pattern synthesis + motion when ambiguous; gap inference when no match — never the whole compendium. Design-reviewer skill and agent: headless Playwright quality gate (playwright-skill-bridge.mjs) — CI-safe, no DevTools MCP — Nielsen heuristics UX scoring (0-100), diff mode, review-checklist synergy, functional/behavior-change escalation, Categories A–F in phase files. Opus + haiku mechanical dispatch; .agent-progress/ logs. Update-component-index skill for the component compendium index.
